title: Embed boards on website
excerpt: What’s everyone’s favorite method of embedding monday.com boards on their website? I saw this by gorilla apps: Examples for Board to Website Widget for monday.com · Gorilla Apps

posts.author: Charlie_F (Charlie)
posts.cookedHtml: What’s everyone’s favorite method of embedding monday.com boards on their website? I saw this by gorilla apps: Examples for Board to Website Widget for monday.com · Gorilla Apps

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Charlie,

We embed to sharepoint using the native Monday.com function and adding view.monday.com to the HTML Field Security.

How to share a board view publicly – Support (monday.com)

Kate

posts.author: Charlie_F (Charlie)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Kate! I am looking for options without the “powered by monday.com” branding. The option I mentioned does not support board views with widgets so it is almost what I need.
